title: Implement database.postgresql and database.mysql packs
description: Create internal/packs/database/postgresql.go (5 safe, 10 destructive) and mysql.go (4 safe, 8 destructive). SQL content matching via SQLContent for DROP TABLE/DATABASE, TRUNCATE, DELETE/UPDATE without WHERE. Both env-sensitive. Unit tests for case-insensitive SQL, flag-value extraction, interactive vs command modes. Golden files.
